playbook.intent: Get a 2–3 person agency to a state where it is sellable to a strategic buyer, an acqui-hirer, or transferable to a manager-operator within 6–12 months. Even if not selling, the same prep removes founder from the critical path.
playbook.scope: Get a 2–3 person agency to a state where it is sellable to a strategic buyer, an acqui-hirer, or transferable to a manager-operator within 6–12 months. Even if not selling, the same prep removes founder from the critical path.

success-criteria.criterion: All 5 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Decide the Path
stage.intent: Acquisition vs graceful walk-away — pick one.

tasks.task: Score: do I want a buyer or do I want to shut down cleanly
Set the target outcome (sale price, walk-away timeline)
Tell the founder advisors and start the clock

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the path is written down with a deadline.

stage.name: Tighten the Books
stage.intent: A buyer (or your own clean exit) needs clean financials.

tasks.task: Reconcile last 24 months of revenue, costs, and ownership
Separate founder personal expenses from agency books
Produce a clean P&L + balance sheet review

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the books pass an independent advisor review.

stage.name: Document the Operating System
stage.intent: Make the business runnable without you.

tasks.task: Document SOPs, client contracts, vendor list, and IP
Identify single-points-of-failure (you) and write the bench / replacement plan

stage.decision-gate: Advance when a deputy could run delivery for 30 days using these docs.

stage.name: Build the Pitch or Wind-Down Plan

tasks.task: If acquisition: build the data room and the seller deck
If walk-away: write the client handover and contract termination plan
Get advisor signoff on the pitch or wind-down plan

outputs.output: data room + seller deck OR handover plan

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when advisor signs off in writing.

stage.name: Execute

tasks.task: Talk to 5-10 qualified buyers OR run the wind-down per plan
Negotiate or finalize handovers; close any open scope cleanly
Sign the deal or sign the agency closed

outputs.output: buyer conversations log OR handover log

stage.decision-gate: Required output: written closure — sold, signed, or shut down.
